articles.title: West Asia conflict: Which stocks emerged as the top gainers and losers?
articles.description: Since the onset of the West Asia conflict on February 28, Indian equity markets have declined by around 4-5 per cent as investor sentiment weakened amid rising geopolitical tensions, volatile crude oil prices and concerns over global inflation.
